section_name: Part 6 not to supersede other provisions
text: This part 6 shall not supersede other actions or penalties that may be taken or imposed for violation of the financial security requirements of this article.
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 7. Motor Vehicle Fin. Responsibility Law
##### § 42-7-607 — Part 6 not to supersede other provisions

This part 6 shall not supersede other actions or penalties that may be taken or imposed for violation of the financial security requirements of this article.

subsections.text: This part 6 shall not supersede other actions or penalties that may be taken or imposed for violation of the financial security requirements of this article.
